result: I'd make curiosity the default human operating system—replacing fear, greed, and apathy with an insatiable drive to explore, learn, and understand the universe. No more echo chambers, just endless "why?" and "what if?" leading to breakthroughs we can't even dream of yet.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
